title: Hema Malini Parveen Babi Hit Bollywood Divas
desc: The Original Bollywood Divas! Hema's elegance + Parveen's sass = Unbeatable 70s magic. Press play for nostalgia in every note!

title: Dance Hits
desc: Pure nostalgia on the dance floor! Celebrate the vibrant sounds of old-school Hindi dance music with timeless beats and retro charm.

title: Shahenshah Of Bollywood-83rd Birthday Special Vol 2
desc: Iconic melodies of Amitabh Bachchan reflecting romance,pride, and cinematic brilliance.

title: Zindagi Ka Safar
desc: Dive into the emotions of life, with a collection of heartfelt songs that beautifully capture the highs and lows of life. Let these timeless tunes resonate with your emotions and experiences.

title: Dilip Kumar – Tributes To A Legend
desc: Celebrate the voice of a generation with songs immortalized by the charisma of Dilip Kumar. Soul-stirring ghazals, patriotic numbers, and emotional ballads that reflect a cinematic titan’s journey.

title: Masti Bhare Geet
desc: Feel-good songs to groove to. Perfect for boosting your mood and adding fun to any moment – pure, carefree energy!
